name: Hoosiers Holdings
summary: Hoosiers Holdings, through its subsidiaries, engages in planning, selling, and managing condominiums, self-owned detached houses, and apartments in Japan. The company operates through six segments: Condominium Apartments for Families and Singles, CCRC, Houses and Flats, Real Estate Investment, Property Management and Related Services, and Other. It engages in the real estate investment, development, leasing, and brokerage activities, as well as management of hotels; insurance business; management of sports facilities; and investment management, advisory, and consulting business activities. The company was founded in 2013 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
